page_metadata.biotools__summary: circad is a comprehensive manually curated resource of circular RNA associated with diseases. Circular RNAs (circRNAs) are unique transcript isoforms characterised by back splicing of exon ends to form a covalently closed loop or circular conformation.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: circad is a comprehensive manually curated resource of circular RNA associated with diseases. Circular RNAs (circRNAs) are unique transcript isoforms characterised by back splicing of exon ends to form a covalently closed loop or circular conformation.
